title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, allowed in OS settings, new UI
scenario: Notifications UI does not update after enabling notifications via OS settings from the Poly Studio Mobile app's General settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, selecting "Don't Allow" when prompted for notification permissions.
2. Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications.
4. Tap "Go to Settings" to navigate to the OS notification settings for the app.
5. Enable notifications for the Poly Studio Mobile app in the OS settings.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the Notifications screen in the app.
expected: The app UI updates to show all notification settings unlocked and set to ON, allowing the user to change them.
